basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand State Council For Science And Technology

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Yatra Anudan” is implemented by the Uttarakhand State Council for Science and Technology (UCOST) under the Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to support researchers and scientists in attending international scientific workshops and other similar programs by providing eligible applicants with travel grants covering up to 50% of the expenses (maximum ₹25,000/-).
schemeContent.benefits_md: - The Council provides travel grants to researchers and scientists to participate in international scientific workshops and other similar programs. - Under this scheme, 50% of the travel expenses (up to a maximum of ₹25,000/-) are provided to researchers and scientists of the state.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support researchers and scientists in attending international scientific workshops and other programs by providing eligible applicants with travel grants covering up to 50% of the expenses (maximum ₹25,000/-).

children.text: The scheme “Yatra Anudan” is implemented by the Uttarakhand State Council for Science and Technology (UCOST) under the Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to support researchers and scientists in attending international scientific workshops and other similar programs by providing eligible applicants with travel grants covering up to 50% of the expenses (maximum ₹25,000/-).
The Council provides travel grants to researchers and scientists to participate in international scientific workshops and other similar programs.
Under this scheme, 50% of the travel expenses (up to a maximum of ₹25,000/-) are provided to researchers and scientists of the state.
The application for financial assistance must be submitted in the prescribed format (available on the Council's website:
) and should also be forwarded by the Head of the Department.

applicationProcess.process_md: The application for financial assistance must be submitted in the prescribed format (available on the Council's website: [https://ucost.uk.gov.in/](https://ucost.uk.gov.in/)) and should also be forwarded by the Head of the Department.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand. 1. The applicant must be a researcher or scientist.

children.text: The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The applicant must be a researcher or scientist.
